case_title: KENNETH A. HANSEL RESPONDENT VS. ACKLAND, LEE DBA BEDS & BEDDING APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR REHEARING FILED BY APPELLANT LEE ACKLAND ORDER SEND TO JUDGE DENNIS C BEIRKHIMER.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2005 - JUDGMENT. THE COURT DENIED THE PETITION FOR REHEARING AS TO THE APPELLANT, LEE ACKLAND, DBA BEDS AND BEDDING FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR IN COURT ON 3/4/905 AT 2:00 P.M. IN DEPT. 525. MOREOVER, THE COURT REAFFIRMED THE JUDGMENT OF 12/9/04 IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT KENNETH A. HANSEL AND AGAINST APPELLANT LEE ACKLAND DBA BEDS AND BEDDING.

RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ACKLAND, LEE DBA BEDS & BEDDING AS TO RESPONDENT HANSEL, KENNETH A. HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 809313
MINUTES FOR MAR-04-2005 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HANSEL, KENNETH A. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ACKLAND, LEE DBA BEDS & BEDDING $1,627.50 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,649.50, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
